description: Use this API to enable or disable the simulation option setting that scans for out-of-step conditions using a generic relay. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = set_osscan(status, trip) ierr, status,trip = set_osscan()
python_syntax: ierr = set_osscan(status, trip) ierr, status,trip = set_osscan()

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Option setting. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

parameters.name: trip
parameters.description: Monitor trip flag. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
